top_chunks.text: Customer transaction records must be retained for 7 years. Archived records must remain accessible for audit and regulatory review. Deletion of retained records before the retention period ends is prohibited unless required by law.

Data quality issues must be documented and escalated to the responsible data steward. Critical data defects must be reviewed within one business day. Recurring quality issues must be tracked for root cause analysis and remediation.

Access to sensitive customer data must be restricted to authorized personnel only. All access to confidential and regulated data must be logged. Quarterly reviews must be performed to confirm that access remains appropriate.
